detectors.description:

	- fees = amount.mul(sellTotalFees).div(100) (ELON.sol#1999)
	- tokensForTreasury = (fees * sellTreasuryFee) / sellTotalFees (ELON.sol#2003)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in ELON._transfer(address,address,uint256) (ELON.sol#1829-2043):
	External calls:
	- swapBack() (ELON.sol#1961)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForTokensSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,treasuryWallet,block.timestamp) (ELON.sol#2065-2077)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- super._transfer(from,address(this),fees) (ELON.sol#2023)
		- _balances[sender] = senderBalance - amount (ELON.sol#755)
		- _balances[recipient] += amount (ELON.sol#759)
	ERC20._balances (ELON.sol#441) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ERC20._mint(address,uint256) (ELON.sol#791-811)
	- ERC20._transfer(address,address,uint256) (ELON.sol#729-769)
	- ERC20.balanceOf(address) (ELON.sol#571-575)
	- super._transfer(address(this),uniswapV2Pair,tokensForLiquidity) (ELON.sol#2029)
		- _balances[sender] = senderBalance - amount (ELON.sol#755)
		- _balances[recipient] += amount (ELON.sol#759)
	ERC20._balances (ELON.sol#441) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ERC20._mint(address,uint256) (ELON.sol#791-811)
	- ERC20._transfer(address,address,uint256) (ELON.sol#729-769)
	- ERC20.balanceOf(address) (ELON.sol#571-575)
	- super._transfer(from,to,amount) (ELON.sol#2041)
		- _balances[sender] = senderBalance - amount (ELON.sol#755)
		- _balances[recipient] += amount (ELON.sol#759)
	ERC20._balances (ELON.sol#441) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ERC20._mint(address,uint256) (ELON.sol#791-811)
	- ERC20._transfer(address,address,uint256) (ELON.sol#729-769)
	- ERC20.balanceOf(address) (ELON.sol#571-575)
	- swapping = false (ELON.sol#1965)
	ELON.swapping (ELON.sol#1451) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ELON._transfer(address,address,uint256) (ELON.sol#1829-2043)
